main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'mechanical seal failure tube 2 end cap + tube sheet bolts re-torquing + progressive bypass' literal — captura sello + reinstalación.

key_signals.justification: Conecta evidencia: caída rechazo localizada T-02 + probe + fuga histórica + pista desgastada.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (membrane perforation OXID, fouling/scaling, O-ring interno, FRP microcrack).

recommended_action.justification: Isolate Tube 2 + LOTO + replace end cap + O-ring + cap seat + inspect tube sheet — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide photo/medición O-ring cap + cap-seat surface — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: pressure test continúa pérdida → switch a FRP daño.
